# SendHorizontal

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::SendHorizontal;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        SendHorizontal { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
email, message, mail, paper airplane, paper aeroplane, submit

## Categories
mail, communication, connectivity

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/send-horizontal)
